    15. findPermissionsByClan(String, String)

Interface ClanDao

public interface ClanDao
JDBI DAO for the clans, clan_members, and clan_member_permissions tables.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    static final record 
    ClanDao.ClanRow
    Raw row from the clans table.
    static final record 
    ClanDao.MemberRow
    Raw row from the clan_members table.
    static final record 
    ClanDao.PermissionRow
    A member UUID paired with one of their permission names (null if they have none).

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    deleteClan(String clanId, String serverId)
    Deletes a clan by ID and server.
    void
    deleteMember(String playerUuid, String serverId)
    Deletes a member row by player UUID and server.
    void
    deletePermission(String playerUuid, String serverId, String permission)
    Revokes a specific permission from a member.
    List<ClanDao.ClanRow>
    findAllClans(String serverId)
     
    Optional<ClanDao.ClanRow>
    findClanById(String clanId, String serverId)
    Finds a clan by its UUID on a given server.
    Optional<ClanDao.ClanRow>
    findClanByName(String serverId, String name)
    Finds a clan by its display name within a server (case-sensitive).
    Optional<ClanDao.MemberRow>
    findMemberByPlayer(String playerUuid, String serverId)
    Finds the member row for a given player on a given server.
    List<ClanDao.MemberRow>
    findMembersByClan(String clanId, String serverId)
    Returns all member rows for the given clan on a given server.
    List<ClanDao.PermissionRow>
    findPermissionsByClan(String clanId, String serverId)
    Returns one row per (member, permission) for a clan, with a null permission for members who hold none (via LEFT JOIN).
    List<String>
    findPermissionsForPlayer(String playerUuid, String serverId)
    Returns all permission names currently held by a player on a given server.
    void
    insertClan(String clanId, String serverId, String name, long createdAt)
    Inserts a new clan row.
    void
    insertMember(String playerUuid, String serverId, String clanId, boolean isLeader, long joinedAt)
    Inserts a new member row.
    void
    insertPermission(String playerUuid, String serverId, String permission)
    Grants a permission to a member.
    void
    setLeader(String playerUuid, String serverId, boolean isLeader)
    Sets the is_leader flag for a member on a given server.
    void
    updateMotd(String clanId, String serverId, String motd)
    Sets (or clears, when motd is null) the message of the day for a clan.

  • Method Details

    • insertClan

      void insertClan(String clanId, String serverId, String name, long createdAt)
      Inserts a new clan row.
      Parameters:
      clanId - the clan's UUID as a string
      serverId - the server this clan belongs to
      name - the clan's display name
      createdAt - epoch-second creation timestamp

    • deleteClan

      void deleteClan(String clanId, String serverId)
      Deletes a clan by ID and server. ON DELETE CASCADE removes member rows automatically.
      Parameters:
      clanId - the clan's UUID as a string
      serverId - the server this clan belongs to

    • findClanById

      Optional<ClanDao.ClanRow> findClanById(String clanId, String serverId)
      Finds a clan by its UUID on a given server.
      Parameters:
      clanId - the clan's UUID as a string
      serverId - the server to look up the clan on
      Returns:
      a row containing clan fields, or empty

    • findClanByName

      Optional<ClanDao.ClanRow> findClanByName(String serverId, String name)
      Finds a clan by its display name within a server (case-sensitive).
      Parameters:
      serverId - the server to search within
      name - the clan name to search for
      Returns:
      a row, or empty if no clan has that name on this server

    • findAllClans

      List<ClanDao.ClanRow> findAllClans(String serverId)
      Parameters:
      serverId - the server to list clans for
      Returns:
      all clan rows for this server, ordered by name

    • updateMotd

      void updateMotd(String clanId, String serverId, String motd)
      Sets (or clears, when motd is null) the message of the day for a clan.
      Parameters:
      clanId - the clan's UUID as a string
      serverId - the server this clan belongs to
      motd - the new MOTD, or null to clear

    • insertMember

      void insertMember(String playerUuid, String serverId, String clanId, boolean isLeader, long joinedAt)
      Inserts a new member row.
      Parameters:
      playerUuid - the member's UUID as a string
      serverId - the server this membership belongs to
      clanId - the clan's UUID as a string
      isLeader - true if this member is the leader
      joinedAt - epoch-second join timestamp

    • deleteMember

      void deleteMember(String playerUuid, String serverId)
      Deletes a member row by player UUID and server.
      Parameters:
      playerUuid - the member's UUID as a string
      serverId - the server this membership belongs to

    • findMemberByPlayer

      Optional<ClanDao.MemberRow> findMemberByPlayer(String playerUuid, String serverId)
      Finds the member row for a given player on a given server.
      Parameters:
      playerUuid - the player's UUID as a string
      serverId - the server to look up membership on
      Returns:
      the member row, or empty if the player is not in any clan on this server

    • findMembersByClan

      List<ClanDao.MemberRow> findMembersByClan(String clanId, String serverId)
      Returns all member rows for the given clan on a given server.
      Parameters:
      clanId - the clan's UUID as a string
      serverId - the server this clan belongs to
      Returns:
      all member rows for this clan

    • setLeader

      void setLeader(String playerUuid, String serverId, boolean isLeader)
      Sets the is_leader flag for a member on a given server.
      Parameters:
      playerUuid - the member's UUID as a string
      serverId - the server this membership belongs to
      isLeader - the new leader flag value

    • insertPermission

      void insertPermission(String playerUuid, String serverId, String permission)
      Grants a permission to a member. Silently ignored if already present.
      Parameters:
      playerUuid - the member's UUID as a string
      serverId - the server this permission applies to
      permission - the ClanPermission name

    • deletePermission

      void deletePermission(String playerUuid, String serverId, String permission)
      Revokes a specific permission from a member.
      Parameters:
      playerUuid - the member's UUID as a string
      serverId - the server this permission applies to
      permission - the ClanPermission name

    • findPermissionsForPlayer

      List<String> findPermissionsForPlayer(String playerUuid, String serverId)
      Returns all permission names currently held by a player on a given server.
      Parameters:
      playerUuid - the player's UUID as a string
      serverId - the server to look up permissions for
      Returns:
      list of permission name strings

    • findPermissionsByClan

      List<ClanDao.PermissionRow> findPermissionsByClan(String clanId, String serverId)
      Returns one row per (member, permission) for a clan, with a null permission for members who hold none (via LEFT JOIN). Used to load a clan in two queries.
